star_1.text: This is the worst flight game i ever played. It's extremely difficult to control the plane depending what plane you using like i used the most powerful and is hard to control and the speed. It's also extremely annoying to take off and land because i don't knows how far am i for the airports and i worried about crashing or failed the mission. I would recommend play TFS games after this.

Has potential, but what is the point of a token? Developer has NOT purchased my gold bundle 69.99, or my silver bundle 42.99, and as such is not eligible for my 5 star review or 4 star review. No ads have been watched from the developer, and as such, is not eligible for my 3 star review. Lastly, all planes can only go 1 town or city over. No planes can go more than 100 miles from airport to airport? Really?!?!?

Has potential but brutally wastes it. You don't get realistic physics, you don't get the distance to landing, you don't get exact distance to random mountains, and you don't get to see the ground until you're nearly point blank to it. Could be really fun if any of the tools given to you were practical. It's controls are simple, but you need to REALLY master It if you want to complete a single flight alive.

I'm not really sure what the thrill of this game is. The tutorial is super basic and doesn't explain all of the buttons, the distance to airport read out is super vague and never counts down like the tutorial did, aircraft control reaction is sluggish and unrealistic, and you have zero visibility of what is in front of you. Overall disappointed.

I have about the same complaint as most low ratings: the random failures are quite annoying, as is the low quality distance to airport readout. I know that the devs continue to cite the "buying cockpit upgrades" but if they are going for realism this is just not something that makes sense. Any of these planes would come with precise readouts for everything out of the box in the real world. Another issue is of course the physics. (Allow us to glider better)

Physics and aerodynamics are horrible. If you point nose up, it takes forever to start going up, point nose down and you immediately dive like 2k a second. Impossible to go through mountains when I can barely see what's in front of me, alongside there being a bunch of clouds that, for some reason, cause turbulence. The controls are sloppy, it's impossible for new players to enjoy, and instead of working toward a goal to get new planes or maps, you have to pay 5 dollars for one of those things

Ya know, i like it, i do. But heres my problem, this game has way too many paywalls and i get the need for revenue but this was overdrawn by too much for me to give anything over 1 star, your only ways to unlock planes are 3 ads a day or to pay for in game premium to unlock crates, and to purchase another plane its 4-9 dollars, very overpriced. If the paywall/Adwall gets drawn back and fixed ill give it a much higher rating

I want to love this. No gliding, crates buying changed and planes need permanent upgrades. Distance to airports needs a better meter. Bucks had good value when you could buy crates every few flights. Now they are only good for meaningless upgrades. You can now buy parts once every 8 hours with bucks and get one free crate, or buy more with premium tokens. Newest update has this game nosediving into the trash. Way to kill incentive to play. Just another cash grab. Sad, it WAS a wonderful game.

They removed progression without paying. It used to be so that ypu could spend your money on loot boxes. Then they added a battle pass to get the loot boxes. Now ypu can only get them with the premium currency. The money you earn can only bee spent on one thing. Useless. And you cant turn that sharply so when you see ground ypu are dead. And most of the levels are just strqight lines where you do nothing exept wait untill you get to the destination where you die because you cant land. Dev fd up

I enjoy a good flight sim, and this isn't close to being good. The acceleration and deceleration are too fast and unrealistic. You can't really land properly because the plane turns into a helicopter with the flaps fully extended (that's what you use when you usually land a plane).

1st mission after the tutorial, I had flaps failure. Very hard to make a nice landing through the landing challenge, with flaps failure. 2nd mission after tutorial, I had landing gear failure. It seems like this game wants you to fail. Here's a few tokens, now spend them on no turbulence, and have the landing gear fail. Lol, good luck with landing out of 10. You receives 0 and receive 0 tokens. Receive 15 token if you have a flight quality above 95, lol uninstall. Don't waste money on this.

Kept crashing due to an inadequate View in front of the plane, even tried zooming out an still had a poor view in front of me, the physics suck as well, I had high hopes for this too, thought it was gonna be like this Browser game I played back in 2009 or 2010 which I had a great experience with but this game doesn't even scratch it

Horrible. The entire game is easy. The only gimmick being you need to guess your approach to the airport. There's no way to correctly guess your approach because the indicator is pretty useless. You either get lucky or crash usually it's the latter. Once you get the landing down the game becomes boring. Not worth it.

The worst controls and physics I have ever seen in a game that claims to be "realistic". The landing speed that it claims is correct makes you bounce off the runway even if you are below it. There is also no way to slow down in the air so it makes it really difficult to achieve the landing speed. Also you can only buy one plane with the in-game currency, the others are all 4, 5, or 7 dollars. Just make the game paid at this point.

Not particularly fun or unique and has way too many paywalls. The only way to get new planes without paying is to either watch ads and gamble or rely on limited and random daily purchases to maybe get a fraction of a new plane. Unlocking the map is unbearably grindy if you don't want to pay even more for xp on top of the planes and plane upgrades.

The gameplay is good but cargo somehow takes dmg at high altitudes parts somehow break down midflight I spent hours getting to this one location just for it to be a dead end on the map so I have to travel back all the way which will cost all the money I got tgetting here and fuel costing the same amount no matter how much fuel is left literally makes zero sense

Game not playable in this stage. The last free plane is so unrealistic you push down with like 10 degree nose up and it takes half a minute to go to 10 degrees nose down this makes it really difficult to play and not fun. The start of the game is super fun but the game makes itself more difficult by not letting you controll (and upgrading doesn't affect this) Also the game is built for the start the warning that you should descend is 2 seconds before youre all ready above it you cant see front.

I am an avgeek and play flight simulations in my free time like xplane 11 but when I saw this Sim and played it for a bit I was disappointed number one there are way to many trees next to the runway when I am trying to desend and land trees are blocking me and it is almost impossible not to crash...

The game is awesome. Landings are tough, though. The thing that I loathe so much about this game and the thing that gives this 2 stars in my book... is that you start in Greece. Greece, both in game and in life is SUPER mountainous. The only way to get out of the woods, or should I say, valleys, is to get to Athens and then head to the islands. But in order to get to Athens, you need to pass unbelievable amounts of mountains. I am unable to. Also, the palm trees are 100+ meters tall. No gliding.

Absolutely frustrated rn bought the giga bundle today to unlock everything and still everything is locked and when I go to the store it says I already own the bundle but yet it still has everything locked absolutely frustrated is there way to either fix it or get a refund...

star_2.text: I want to love this game, the first to maps ate fantastic, easy to progress and trying to get 3 starts on every route, it's when you get to Germany, when you complete the map by getting all starts, you can not get the a plane that can make that trip, Germany to America, I believe you need one of the only two airliners to get to the trip, both a rare to get and takes time, I'm stuck to getting on every 4 hours to get the cheapest box, and wait until i get a airliner

Pay to play Basically using 0 cash you cannot progress any further and all you do is making money that you don't even have where to spend, expect the fact that you have to pay for the fuel. Once you unlock the 3 first planes, no more planes are for free, except the one that you win as a gift for idk what exact reason. The other thing is that you have only 6 or 7 places to fly in an ordered matter. There are many other places marked but you can't visit them. Idk, lame to me.

Game itself if fine. I would enjoy it if I could spend the earned game gold on more planes or maps but all u can buy is upgrades that don't last past one flight and one extra plane other than the 3 we are given. There is no point to keep playing and definitely no point to buy planes and maps that cost real money.

Initially I thought the game was fun. Not the most realistic flight sim but its also 2d. Its a stylized game and if you take it for what it is its great. However, all maps, and planes except 1 are locked behind a paywall making the ingame currency useless except for cockpit upgrades you need to rebuy after everyflight. Other players have made similar reviews suggesting a unlock method using the ingame currency, but the developer doesnt respond to these reviews. Another good game ruined by greed

In my experience of playing for a few hours, have noticed problems that can be solved quite quickly but are not being addressed. 1, the mountains infront of the runways make the game very hard land . 2, if the back of the plane even grazes the ground, it will explode. 3, the runway size is to small to land aircrafys bigger than 1 and 2 without flipping. 4, to little sight. 5, hard to upgrade planes as little parts come out for existing planes. 6, refuel needs to be according to amount needed.

Really interesting game I love the concept. But it's not that good. It's way too difficult! Physics don't feel natural. No realistic gliding. And it's virtually impossible to avoid damaging cargo or passenger quality. The developers really need to relook the mechanics so this can be more enjoyable for replayability. Not just being constantly annoyed at the gameplay.

I want to like this game so badly, but there's just so many small issues that add up to a non fun experience. A lot of the airports have terrain TOO close to runways, making them impossible for some aircraft. There should be a option to buy the cockpit upgrades permanently even if for each aircraft separately. The only way to unlock aircraft is RNG, poor design. And there should just be a simple IAP to remove ads. The game has so much potential, I just hope it improves. I did support with IAP.

This game is pretty trash. Excessive amounts of failures that pretty much make it near impossible to land. Even the challenges of transporting people or cargo is horrible. All quality degrades to do basic pitch angles. Can't even glide the plane when engine fails. Drops like a rock. Can't see anything around you so when you put freaking palm trees on top of the runway it's horrible

It's perfect, my only problem is that the runways are a bit short Was a great game, but now there's a season pass and stuff like that. Devolving into a generic mobile game :( I had also purchased a pack to get all the planes some time ago before the p2w stuff but there's no option to restore purchases.

The game has good shapes, but summary it's bad on current stage: 1) tokens almost useless - upgrades only one-flight (you can make them expensive but forever, removing no-failures) 2) 3 planes available, other part of game - only pay to play, so looks unreachable. 3) Why passengers hate when I change angle of plane? This not feels in any plane uncomfortable in real plane.

It's a fun concept of a game, but done poorly. It's a much more challenging game than it needs to be, with you not being able to see the ground and calculate when to land. This problem especially comes into play when you are on a map that has mountains right before the runway, requiring you to dive and crash most the time, with me not being able to do the landing most the time. Would be better if they added a feature where you could look at the ground or have less mountains before runways.

Nice concept but the game is a reinvention of the wheel. It is challenging for the sake of being challenging. I find it so much harder than actual simulations due to the extreme tunnel vision of the display and the poor layout of the UI. I know there are upgrades which will help make the game easier but surely it makes little sense to throw newbies in with none of this. A better system would be a rewards based on difficulty setting. Hard = no aids = 100% reward. Easy = all aids = 20% etc.

The concept was executed really good for this game but the reason why I'm giving it a 2-star is because it is so hard to fly and land with whatever the vertical speed mechanic is, as well as in real life if your plane is at 0 percent throttle it can glide in this game at 0 percent throttle you literally drop out of the sky. Also it is almost impossible to to get a 100% rating. Please fix this.

visually detailed controls, however, wouldn't take off unless you're going very fast, flying straight ahead says I'm going down, and you don't have to land. Nothing in the air to avoid. Then it threw a microtransaction in my face. First experience says: not worth it

This game is unrealistic the complete opposite than the game says it is. The game feels more like some kind of mini game that the only objective is to survive and not to stoll, crash into trees, crash into the ground, Stoll and explode on the ground even though your 2m off the ground and crash into the mountains that you ABSOLUTELY CAN NOT SEE. The worst thing about this game is that you can't see any THING either it's in front of your plane or the bottom of your plane or in every direction!

Today the game opened broken. All missions in Germany were reset, the objectives menu was greyed out and the left menu was also unavailable. To be honest the game progress was way too slow. Going to New York wasn't possible with the planes I owned. Not every manual landing was rewarded. Nice idea but as a whole I could not be bothered to repeat all the missions in Germany just to hit the grinding wall called New York again.

This is a good concept that was poorly executed. The game lacks basic flight dynamics and physics. It feels like the plane is just pivoting around an axis while being pulled forwards, as it can pitch up a lot while not showing any climb tendency before suddenly falling out of the sky. I suggest these improvements: Better flight dynamics. Should be able to glide after the engine stops, now you just fall out of the sky. Cockpit upgrades should be permanent, but in return they should cost more.

The concept is good but awful execution. Why does the airplane touchdown and bounce 5000 feet in the air when you land? So much artificial difficulty that makes the game less fun and more annoying. The controls aren't as responsive either. You pitch the yoke down extend flaps and you're airplane is climbing into the stratosphere. Horrendous, I'm trying to like it. Update: Once you learn the mechanics, it's quite simple really. However, there are still a few problems.

The game itself is amazing, and I have played it for a while. I decided to reinstall it recently, and noticed that the F16 I bought was locked. There should be a way to restore my purchase since it is a major issue if anyone chooses to uninstall the game after purchasing something.

It keeps crashing, so I can't really rate it at all, if a dev can please tell me why the game keeps crashing that'll be amazing, I can't even hit accept on the terms and conditions :( If it's just a problem on my part (device prob) then it's alr but if it's with the game please tell me, someone please help :')

star_3.text: Its an alright game. However, test flying some of the faster planes, You dont really get to experience them as you only get '40' miles. way too short to get a feel for them. And i wouldn't call this a 'realistic simulator' cause if you drop the throttle to 0 or you run out of fuel, there is no gliding you just fall out of the sky. speed is only dictated by the throttle position and nothing else.

Great Concept, Bad Execution! Its next to impossible to know what's coming up, every aspect of flight is nickle and dimed(pay to see the ground, pay for AP, etc..). The flight physics feel off. I really wanted to like this game, its just so frustratingly hard(and Ive flown real planes) and if its not for the zero visibility, the flight speed will get you. The parallax is screwed up so you think your moving slower until a tree comes at you at the speed of light. This game needs a serious overhaul

Would be good... My problem is that you can't go a single flight without getting some failure like distances or landing gear or engine. It's just really irritating because they are so dehabilitating and you can't go one flight without getting one. Legit flight simulators are easier than this. Also it is incredibly difficult to land with the palm trees directly in front of the landing strip. I will keep playing to see if it gets easier to play over time but for now 3 stars

Great game at first, but the lack of Hubs makes this game fall short. Other than that, this is one of the better flight sim games on mobile. Other than that, this is a fairly enjoyable game that will last you about 2 months to unlock everything without in app purchases.

It used to be an excellent casual game- you could buy crates for in-game cash and speed up your progress which made playing it worthwhile. Now, you've to spend real money to buy crates or wait for the free one which spawns every 4 hours. And half the planes in this game can only be bought using $$. Highly disappointed with the devs for monetizing it...3/5.

Underated flight game. It's amazingggg! Just two things I dislike and is making it less entertaining is that to open another map I have to pay Would've been better if I'd just play to win a new map. So getting a new map would rely on playing and not paying. Also, only 4 planes can be unlocked, one of them is with a very high number of tokens and the other has to be paid for to get :(

It's a really fun time killer game, tho I have a few problems with it. It's kind of difficult to obtain new planes. (1) It takes too long to get tokens as they only give you 3-5 per flight, should make it 5-7 per flight. (2) the Ads for opening crates takes too long to refresh, taking 4hrs just for 1 Ad for a crate, I suggest making it 2hrs or maybe instead of being able to hold 3 ads crate, make it 5. (3) there's very little use for cash, it'd be great if we can spend the cash for crates as wel

I like the idea, but it needs some changes. I didn't make a single successful flight, including the tutorial. The exact distance to the airport needs to be known, especially when the ground isn't always visible. I like that the game isn't crammed full of ads, but would prefer a one time purchase fee for all the content, like games used to be. With that said, I don't think I'd personally pay more than $8 for this game. I think you would end up with more from this with that than the way it is now.

It gets very tedious I hate having to buy cockpit items over and over again, it would be nice to make it save flight to flight, and the maps are kinda boring and you can't chill at all your always trying not to hit a hill or lose your rating or staying out of the of the wind, and the maps are long for the same thing over and over again the game gets unexciting fast, I wish you went with a more fun and relaxed approach, the physics are good though just the constant focus not to crash sucks.

Overall I really like it. No ads. However there are a couple of things that I don't like. When there is terrain before landing, it is really hard to land because the runway is almost right after. Also if you crash you need to wait four minutes or watch an ad. Also planes are expensive and another plane is 160 tokens which is a long time to wait and a lot of effort to learn however you have a nice turboprop and a cessna so yeah. Overall, I really like this game. Btw stall is easy if u in clouds.

pretty good gameplay and the only ads there are are rewarded. but you only start with 2 aircraft. to unlock 3rd you watch an ad, to unlock the 4th you need 160 in game coins, but all other maps and aircraft are $4 (when bought seperately)-and the bundles are $30 and $40. honestly it would be great to add another use to the coins in game, because all they do is buy upgrades, refuel, and buy 4th aircraft. could you make atleast someother planes purchaseable with in game coins?

It's a fun game but they should add more planes. There are not a lot of big airliners like Boeings and airbuses. They also need to improve the crash physics. Also, when I'm landing on a runway and I touchdown my plane bounces up and I have to circle around the airport but everytime I try to touchdown I get launched back up into the air. This happens for so long my fuel runs out, and my plane crashes. I really wanted to enjoy this game but it has so many problems. Please fix them.

Nice game once you get past the learning curve. New planes do take rather long to unlock, and half the planes can only be unlocked with real cash. My biggest gripe however would be the mountains. The last update mentioned moving them further away from the airports, but this seems to only be the case in Greece. I'm flying in Germany right now and the mountains are still immediately before and after the airports, making it extremely hard to fly from and to them.

Great game, it's just I was disappointed to see that the Airbus costs real money... also its pretty much impossible to land because theres always some sort of obstacle in the way, and the view is very low. I hate the idea of paying tokens before every flight for autopilot and other stuff, why can't we just permanently upgrade?

This game is really fun it's just the only thing that annoyanc me the most is the warning about a mountain coming in your way. But it tells you when your do close to the mountain. It'so annoying.And it doesn't let you buy more planes just one I think. The people who made this game should check it and make some changes please.

It has much potential. Although it's kinda difficult to control the plane. It's very hard to land because of the mountains behind the runway and after the runway, we can crash easily, so please fix that. I reckon that the game has much space for improvement, so keep up the work👍

Only 3 because despite it being a great concept it's supper buggy. The controls and finicky and have no way to trim the aircraft to fly at a stable angle of attack. Great concept and hope to see this game get better so I'm more willing to spend money on it. (Already have a little.)

This game is fun, although quite challenging. I hate the fact that often during touchdown, my aircraft randomly goes up and down and misses the runway. Another problem is that some airports have mountains right ahead of the runway and it's hard to avoid, the terrain warning also comes quite late..

Has great potential for the future but still needs a little more work. I think the mechanics for actually flying the planes are really nice but there are only a few airplanes you can get for free so I would suggest adding more and maybe adding different types of crates for example in different rarities which would give you a better choice in what you could spend your money on.

Loved it before now, but now it's too gimmicky. I like they added more planes but all the loot boxes after every flight slow the game down loads and the new ui is far worse. And putting in an autoland WITHOUT an upgrade is a terrible choice cuz the only challenging parts of the flight are taking off and landing and landing was always the hardest. Now the games pointless and way to easy

star_4.text: The game is made very well. One problem, when i want to get a chest, it never plays the ad so i can get the chest. I also tried to test flight a plane, but it didn't work. EDIT: Now the crates are bugged, and the time limit for the 4 hour crate isn't going down. It's been like this for about 2 days now. EDIT 2: I made a smooth landing, and it bounces me up again. Even with hard landings, I crashed and lost two planes because of this problem.

This 2D flight simulator is a great one, don't get me wrong, there are a variety of planes to fly however I do have some criticism towards the game. I am very understanding towards many games as I am a game dev myself, but I feel that we shouldn't have to pay a great deal of money in exchange for maps, this instantly feels like a slap to the face towards your consumers as they'll feel the game is a cash grab. We also need more planes, more jet engine passenger carrying planes, keep that in mind.

Now, I dont know what's going on. But the game seems to be freezing a lot now (basically the game stops working but the rest of my phone is normal. I can still swipe my toolbar down and stuff) . I tried clearing cache and data but still. I'm sure your game is amazing because of all the ratings I've seen others place but I cant experience that truly for myself. It's not your fault it's probably mine but idk what's happening. The freezing is practically unpredictable. It happens at any time.

This game is a great game, the mechanics are confusing at first but once you get used to them you pretty much mastered it. Another thing I want to say is the graphics, the graphics are really good for a 2d game. But with every good thing there has to be 1 or 2 bad things with it. Whenever I log into the game there's a 50/50 chance I get logged out the game. Also there isn't really a wide selection of planes for you. But I definitely recommend play this game

The game itself is fun to play, and I enjoy it. However, I'm quickly losing interest in playing after obtaining the one in app purchase you can get with earned tokens instead of money. Because you can't earn additional maps or aircraft (besides the smallest passenger jet,) there's no incentive to continue playing.

pretty fun, but there is a bug where if you somehow press flip and auto-land at the sane time (my thumbs are too big for my screen), your plane flips around and tries to fly back to the airport where you took off. if you hit something it just says "oops!" then teleports you the target and doesn't pay you for the round trip worth of gas. (the flight I had to do was 70 miles one way, and I have a 66 liter gas tank)

I'd say it's a pretty fun experience; having to constantly manage several things such as altitude and speed is somewhat challenging, which does make it fun. Visuals are rather simplistic and pleasant. However, I would prefer having autopilot and similar functions to be a one-time-purchase for individual planes, instead of having to re-purchase them each flight. The lack of intrusive ads is appreciated. Overall, a pretty decent game; keep up the good work! 10/10 would crash into a mountain again

It's a good game, but there are some problems:The Chest won't play the ad even after I clicked it, I also can't skip the loading times of the planes repairing. There is also a bug where the rating keeps going down even if there is no turbulence. Please fix these bugs, it is really annoying. Other than that, I love the game!
It's a good game with a few iffs besides that, it's a really good offline game that you could play in your free time.Anywhere

i like the game, its a cute little flight simulator to play around with, but when you go nose down you descend too fast, but when you try leveling its hard! and everything cost money in the game. Can you maybe make maps 500 tokens, and the physics a bit better? Also, you lose qll your starts if you do a single crash. impossible for the landing challenge.

Its a nice game, but tokens are less useful when you don't need cockpit upgrades. And looks like most of the planes are premium and make the game less fun because nothing to achieve, so i recommend to un-premium some of the plane or make a new plane with a high cost the game is not really customizable which is not like other sandbox games maybe the next update will be better. See the game later.

Really fun flight sim with an arcade feel. I only wish it were easier to unlock more planes. I'm stuck in Greece with no opportunity to get free crates that I can figure. I won't stop playing but it feels half finished unless I buy a bunch of things with real money. Thanks for a fun game.

This makes a nice change from the many 3D offerings. It's quirky, quite a change as a side-scroller. I appreciated the Dev's work on this, there's more than few hours gone into this game (it's a game folks, some comments concerning realism are missing the point?) Nice graphics, instrument panel looks great and the aircraft are animated beautifully. I do agree that landing is awkward. It's hard to visualise an approach to landing with screen space. Perhaps a dotted glide path line to follow?

I genuinely enjoy this game, I am a fixed wing flight major in university and I really enjoy how you managed to capture the concept that speeds controls altitude and pitch controls speed. My two pieces of feed back are this, 1 add a first person mode, just a simple classic doom style view with the trees rising and falling as you climb and decend. 2 decrease the amount failures or implement a maintenance feature where a bar is drained that you pay to refill if not then failure chance goes up.

I really like this game. One thing you could improve though, the terrain warning needs to be more specific. What I mean is, it needs to alert you if your plane is going to hit a tree on the mountain instead of just the mountain itself. The amount of times I've flown into a tree on a mountain and killed everyone on board because there is no warning for trees... If you want me to elaborate, I'll send you an email. Thanks.

A sweet and simple game but also challenging at the same time. I really love to play this game whenever possible throughout my day. As u get experience of flights u get to know every minute detail the devs have put inside this game. Some things can be better, hope the devs identify it and try to solve it in updates.

Really sick game, love it. But it is very hard to determine when you have to land, because you can't see the ground or what's in front of you without upgrades, almost every time I crash into a hill or something else bad happens, without this mild inconvenience, it would be a 5/5

this game is perferct but i found some problems : CONTROLLS: there are only 2 buttens that says "pitch up" and "pitch down". the problem is that the buttens are so sensitive that if you press the for a little bit, your plane will change altitude by a lot. i would like to see slider. PHYSICS: physics are good by the altitude and veryical speed are bad because it says 2000 but when you little pitch down it goes to 1000 and then crash to palm trees. vertical speed is showing to high numbers.

Excellent game! But one issue. After this new update, I couldn't able to access the crate (which we buy with 250 cash). It's pale in colour, along with the daily mission button. Please correct this issue, and I'll rate 5 star!

It's very good I recommend such good game. But I have a few things I wanna add and not be satisfied about. 1 it is very challenging to land a plane, and there is no way to tell if there is the airport in front of you is there. I see no warning of an airport anywhere. Maybe add some kind of radar so I can prepare to land. Ty for this awesome game though ☺️☺️☺️☺️

star_5.text: This has gotten much better with age. :) I'm glad you get extra dough for landing. It would be nice if you could move the camera a bit so when you're zoomed in, or out really, you can see the mountains and landing strips. I'm very happy cockpit upgrades uses earned currency. I swear you had to use some gems or other lameness to buy them. This is a nice change! Good job devs and heading in the right direction it seems! :)

Great experience! I'm addicted to this game. It's challenging but rewarding. The interface and sounds are great. The faster planes are very hard to slow down and land; they seem trivial to use most of the time due to the distances. I don't understand the crates very well. I've unlocked all the planes with multiple levels but haven't unlocked the 4th plane. This is an amazing game for flight lovers, and I look forward to its growth. Thank you!

I think it would be a really cool sim, with lots of different controls to interact with. BUT. It keeps freezing...I uninstalled 2 times installed twice, less than 2 minutes in it freezes, at different places, I restarted it at least 10 times, and everytime it froze. First time when I was about to turn key on, another as I was adjusting flaps, another when I was setting throttle.

It is a fun game and I really love it... but you should be able to buy more aircraft like the heavyair 5 for gold and the jets should be cost money. I think that there should be more airplanes to buy for gold also! Also the upgrades for the cockpit should stay there, but if you crash or break the ship it should be taken away. These updates would make the game more polished and refined.

best game ever, best offline plane game. well top 5. if you ask me here's what should be best to add. creates also cost the money not just token. maybe 500 for normal or 1k. next is a cockpit upgrade to know how high the terrain is. and 2nd maybe add gliding when no throttle or fuel. but overall, what I really want is another way to spend money. BEST. but this is still G.O.A.T.E.D. game

lots of fun easy to learn and for once, an optional tutorial that is quite nice as it makes you play and it tells you what to do not do everything for you if you're the kind who likes to learn hands-on, and doesn't like something to blahblahblah at you whilst doing it all for you, this is it. this is youre game. so, get some! 😀

I just don't like the mountains near the runways and I can't fly challenger 300... It just didn't pitch up for no reason and the end is chaotic. Overall the game is good. An idea for devs: maybe you can add taxiways for the players to navigate, it would be fun! Make a top down view to control the aircraft left and right the taxiways. From that you can also add a boarding stage, etc.

A friend showed me this game and I am so glad they did. I love this game and I've played it everyday. I have no problems with this game but I think it would be a cool idea to customize the planes like decals, Different colors, etc.

I like this game my aim is to becoming a pilot and the game is so realistic about flying plane the flaps and the the most important thing landing and take off 😆😆 most fun thing. I think it's best low MB flying game

This is quite good. Only problem is, there really is no way to check the altitude of the terrain. Terrain warning doesnt work, cant gauge how far you are from the mountain top, and the UI just feels clustered, still, this could be fixed simply by using landscape instead, so you dont have a cluttered control panel, better view(you can barely land if you do instrument only flight) as you have more space to see incoming land and your height from below.

this is the best sim for quick flights and well built but on landscape mode the throttle and yoke are right next to each other so I can't have one thumb on each so if the throttle or yoke can swap places with the flaps that would be great, also more long haul aircraft and flights would be nice

Amazing, amazing, amazing. Highly recommend to those who would like a REAL challenge. It takes time to get used to the controls. Otherwise, you'll have a blast. (Recommendation: Maybe have an option to pay for new areas for a ridiculous about of Tokens as a second option of purchase?)

Easy to learn, hard to master. This game is very fun if you're into planes and such and looking for a more realistic experience its easy to play but can be pretty hard to be good at, I do have only one complaint, most of the time when you are about to land at the runway there are mountains that make it difficult to descend to an altitude for landing. Other than this, this is an overall well made and designed game for a realistic and somewhat challenging role.

It's awsome and realy fun but can you devs pls add some more planes especially ones that don't require real money because you can only get 4 planes with in game money but there is more but you have to pay so pls add more planes. And pls make it where you don't always damage the aircraft when your just pitching up or down its annoying and unrealistic.

This game is awesome for learning pilot basics and some flight instruments. I'm 13 and my dream career is as a private pilot so this simulator helps me a lot to also understand the importance of multitasking and concentration. it is really great how you need to keep the different variables realistic. Great game. no negatives about it at all. 11/10

It's a really fun little game, that fits its purpose. Plus, there seems to be very few ads. 11/10. Edit, Four Stars, because with the Mountaineer M12, the flight quality will randomly drop to zero for no reason. Edit again: Never mind, 5 stars, I had never realised that I had just been going too fast.

Hi, i really love this game and thought the level difficulty to aquire planes became fair with free crates every 4 hours but with this recent one i feel you are giving away too much it might make the game less challenging, the auto landing i suggest should be a additional charge like the auto pilot because now the most challenging part of flying the plane which i loved has become just way too easy

Failures, realistic instruments, flaps, turbulence, terrain, turboprops, jets, stalls, vertical speed indicator, autopilot, etc This game has got it all! Can you please update the game to have more stuff to do btw? Missions or a story mode would make this game 10x better.

Amazing game, but there issues, the landings are brutal and the speed machanics is flawed, also you should be able to slide instead of just stalling down after 5 seconds. Edit: it's way better now for sure, I still think there should be a bit more content like passenger flights and stuff

I love this great simulation, in the new update they the mini route graphical details along with the distance remaining, so that it is very convenient for preparing the landing. Thank you so much for the great work. Everybody please give a try this Sim and I am sure you will like it too. Thanks once again to the entire crew who works behind this simulator. Also you can able to fly intl route just thru the hub airports in each country. I love this simulator very much. It's light game but worth.
